stories.original_headline: Young Mars volcano hides a powerful magma engine beneath the surface
stories.original_summary: A Martian volcano once thought to be the result of a single eruption turns out to have a much more complex past. Orbital imaging and mineral data show it developed through multiple eruptive phases, all powered by the same evolving magma system underground. Shifts in mineral composition reveal the ma
stories.fantasy_headline: Red Planet's Young Fire-Mountain Hides Mighty Magical Core
stories.fantasy_story: Ancient chronicles revealed that the young fire-mountain of the Red Planet, once thought to be a single outburst, has a much deeper history. Wizards studying celestial maps and mystic minerals found it grew through many fiery phases. All were powered by an evolving magical core deep within the planet's heart.

stories.original_headline: A hidden force beneath the Atlantic ripped open a 500 kilometer canyon
stories.original_summary: Far beneath the Atlantic Ocean, about 1,000 kilometers off Portugal’s coast, lies a colossal underwater canyon system that dwarfs even the Grand Canyon. Known as the King’s Trough Complex, this 500-kilometer stretch of trenches and deep basins formed not from rushing water, but from dramatic tectoni
stories.fantasy_headline: Secret Earth Magic Carved Vast Canyon Beneath Great Ocean
stories.fantasy_story: Deep below the Great Atlantic Ocean, far off the coast of the Kingdom of Portugale, lies a huge underwater chasm. This King's Trough Complex, stretching 500 leagues, was not carved by rushing tides. Instead, ancient earth magic and slumbering elemental forces tore open the sea floor.

stories.original_headline: Discord distances itself from Persona age verification after user backlash
stories.original_summary: Discord is attempting to distance itself from the age verification provider Persona following a steady stream of user backlash. In an emailed statement to The Verge, Discord's head of product policy, Savannah Badalich, confirms the company "ran a limited test of Persona in the UK where age assurance"
stories.fantasy_headline: Whispers' Guild Halts Age-Scrying Spell After Villager Uproar
stories.fantasy_story: The Whispers' Guild, keepers of the magical communication networks, is stepping back from the Scrollkeepers' Guild's age-scrying enchantment. After many complaints from villagers, the Whispers' Guild confirmed they only tried a small test of the magic in the Kingdom of Britannia. They seek to ensure only the proper age groups access certain mystic circles.

stories.original_headline: Kohler’s new shower reuses dirty water to get you clean
stories.original_summary: Kohler claims its new Anthem EvoCycle smart shower system can deliver "up to 80% water savings" without the use of showerheads that limit flow or pressure. The system instead relies on a reservoir in the shower's base that collects used water and passes it through a filtration system before sending
stories.fantasy_headline: Water-Works Guild Unveils Enchanted Bath for Pure Water Recycling
stories.fantasy_story: The esteemed Water-Works Guild declares its new Anthem EvoCycle cleansing contraption can save up to 80% of precious water. This magical device does not limit the flow, but rather has a hidden basin at its base. It collects used water, then purifies it with special enchantments before sending it forth fresh again.
